name: Almond Honey Bars
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Almonds, blanched and finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add honey, eggs, and lemon rind to the mixture. Mix thoroughly until combined.
3. Sift together the flour, baking powder, and salt three times.
4. Gradually add the sifted ingredients to the honey mixture, alternating with the vanilla extract.
5. Stir in the chopped almonds until evenly distributed.
6. Pour the batter into a shallow, well-oiled pan.
7. Bake in a moderate oven (375°F) for 12-15 minutes or until golden brown.
8. Remove from the oven and let cool slightly.
9. Turn out onto a board dusted with powdered sugar.
10. Cut into oblong bars.
11. Roll each bar in powdered sugar to coat evenly.
16 servings.
